## Quality gates

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` / `lint` / `test` / `build` green
- [ ] Typegen regenerated + committed (only if schemas changed)
- [ ] Migration decision stated: needed (plan linked) / not needed (additive/optional only)
- [ ] `SPEC.md` updated (only if architecture, layer contracts, env vars, or content model changed)
- [ ] Reviewer `APPROVE` on the final diff
